TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Luhung ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 248 buwan, 749 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 80% kyan ku 597 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 20% kyan ku 152 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 75%, Amis 2%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Luhung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Luhung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Luhung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Luhung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Luhung hya' ga Kayu-baliq. tay 'zil na Luhung hya' ga Tuba. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ luħuŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na luħuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na luħuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na luħuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na luħuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na luħuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa kaju-βaliq. taj ʔzil na luħuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa tuβa. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Luhung ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 248 buwan, 749 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 80% kyan ku 597 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 20% kyan ku 152 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 75%, Amis 2%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Luhung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Luhung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Luhung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Luhung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Luhung hya' ga Kayu-baliq. tay 'zil na Luhung hya' ga Tuba. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ luħuŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na luħuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na luħuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na luħuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na luħuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na luħuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa kaju-βaliq. taj ʔzil na luħuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa tuβa. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
